2604.00920.title: GPT-NL Public Corpus: A Permissively Licensed, Dutch-First Dataset for LLM Pre-training
2604.00920.paper_summary: We present the GPT-NL Public Corpus, the biggest permissively licensed corpus of Dutch language resources. The GPT-NL Public Corpus contains 21 Dutch-only collections totalling 36B preprocessed Dutch tokens not present in any other LLM pretraining corpus. Additionally, the corpus includes roughly 207B English, 232B Code, and 48B German/Danish tokens taken from existing sets which we further curated for compliance. This corpus includes curated data from large existing corpora like Common Corpus and Common Crawl, as well as newly created Dutch-specific collections. Most newly created Dutch collections consist of content collected in collaboration with organisations or synthetically augmented content. All data is collected and evaluated with the aim of facilitating the creation of (commercial) language models that are lawful, useful and non-harmful. All data included in the GPT-NL Public Corpus is sourced from datasets with permissive licensing and is curated and redistributed under a CC-BY license. The full dataset is publicly available on the Hugging Face Hub.
2604.00920.paper_summary_zh: 我們呈現 GPT-NL 公共語料庫，這是最大的荷蘭語資源的許可語料庫。<lb/>GPT-NL 公共語料庫包含 21 個僅限荷蘭語的集合，總計 360 億個經過預處理的荷蘭語標記，這些標記在其他任何 LLM 預訓練語料庫中均不存在。<lb/>此外，該語料庫還包括約 2070 億個英語、2320 億個代碼和 480 億個德語/丹麥語標記，這些標記來自現有的數據集，我們進一步整理以符合規範。<lb/>該語料庫包括來自大型現有語料庫（如 Common Corpus 和 Common Crawl）的整理數據，以及新創建的荷蘭語特定集合。<lb/>大多數新創建的荷蘭語集合由與組織合作收集的內容或合成增強的內容組成。<lb/>所有數據的收集和評估旨在促進創建合法、有用且無害的（商業）語言模型。<lb/>GPT-NL 公共語料庫中包含的所有數據均來自具有寬鬆許可的數據集，並在 CC-BY 許可下進行整理和重新分發。<lb/>完整數據集可在 Hugging Face Hub 上公開獲取。
2604.00920.author: Jesse van Oort et.al.
2604.00920.authors: Jesse van Oort, Frank Brinkkemper, Erik de Graaf, Bram Vanroy, Saskia Lensink
